notable_excerpts: There is a fair amount of industry engagement with the government on emission norms.
Our 25% EV mix target for FY28.
There is an aggressive localization program that the team is running.
No separate supply chain related disruption on EVs compared to ICE.
Mahindra Finance has announced it will now pivot to growth, focusing on asset quality controls and technology.
Industry engagement with multiple government stakeholders.
We have a new ECL policy which is more in line with industry.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Mahindra & Mahindra's focus on environmental initiatives, particularly around emission norms and EV targets. Social aspects were less emphasized, with some mention of supply chain stability and a pivot towards growth in Mahindra Finance. Governance was addressed through discussions on government engagement and risk management policies.
strengths: Strong focus on emission norms and EV targets
